---
title: "Local Studio"
---

# Testing the agent with `langgraph dev`

::: {.callout-note}
**Audience:** frontend and content contributors comfortable with a terminal. No
LangSmith account required. Plus-tier seat holders can use
[Cloud Studio](../legal-contributor/cloud-studio.qmd) instead.
:::

For contributors without a Plus-tier seat, `langgraph dev` runs the same agent
locally.

```bash
cd backend
uv run langgraph dev [--no-browser]
```

{{< termshow file="demos/langgraph-dev" >}}

This starts a local server on `http://127.0.0.1:2024` with an interactive Studio UI.
You can:

- chat with the agent and see tool calls and RAG results,
- inspect the graph execution step by step,
- use the Configuration panel to iterate on the system prompt — the same workflow as
  Cloud Studio (see
  [Editing the System Prompt](../editing-and-results/system-prompt.qmd)).

Requires `langgraph-cli[inmem]` (already in dev dependencies) and GCP credentials in
your local `.env` (see
[Setup & Environment Variables](../backend-contributor/setup-and-environment.qmd)).

::: {.callout-note}
Safari blocks the `http` redirect, so use Vivaldi/Chrome. `--no-browser` runs
without automatically opening your default browser — navigate to the Studio UI URL
yourself.
:::
